Village Pond.title: 🧙‍♂️ Mysterious Hermit
Village Pond.description: As you explore the quiet shores of Village Pond, you notice a figure sitting by an old willow tree. An elderly hermit with a long, weathered beard looks up from his fishing rod and greets you with knowing eyes.
dialogue: 🧙‍♂️ Hermit: "Ah, another soul drawn to these peaceful waters..."
Hermit: "I've been fishing these shores for many years."
Hermit: "You have the look of someone just beginning their journey."
💡 Hermit: "Luck helps you find rarer catches and avoid catching nothing. Attack and Defense serve you well against creatures in deeper waters. Speed determines combat strikes."
Hermit: "The pond may seem to be enough, but greater adventures await beyond these shores."
Hermit: "May the waters bring you fortune, traveler..." *The hermit returns to quiet fishing.*

Village Pond.title: 🧙‍♂️ The Hermit's Deeper Wisdom
Village Pond.description: The familiar hermit notices your return and your growing skill. His eyes gleam with ancient knowledge as he gestures toward the center of the pond.
dialogue: 🧙‍♂️ Hermit: "Ah, you've returned! I can see the waters have been kind to you..."
Hermit: "Your casting has improved, young angler. You're ready for greater challenges."
Hermit: "Tell me, have you tried the deeper sections of this very pond?"
Hermit: "Most fishers stay near the shallows, content with small catches..."
Hermit: "But beneath these calm surface waters lies another realm..."
Hermit: "I believe you're ready now. Seek out the deeper waters, brave angler!"
🗺️ The hermit's words awaken your knowledge of the pond's hidden depths!
Narrator: *The Old man clutches his chest and faints, collapsing into the water.*
Narrator: *You should get out of here before the villagers find you with a dead hermit!*

Village Pond.title: 🧙‍♂️ The Hermit's Corpse
Village Pond.description: The Hermit's Body has sunken into the depths, maybe you should search for it?
dialogue: A ring lays where the Hermit last sat, you should take it.
*Maybe I should try exploring the depths of the pond...*

Village Well.title: 🪣 Exploring the Well
Village Well.description: You sit in an abandoned village, this well seems like a good place to start exploring. You peer down into the dark depths of the well, the water is murky and you can't see much.
dialogue: This village has been abandoned for years, but the well seems to be stirring with life.
You seek to understand why you have such a strong urge to continue fishing.

Village Well.title: 🪓 Digging Near the Well
Village Well.description: You notice a small patch of disturbed earth near the well. It looks like someone has been digging here recently.
dialogue: You start digging and uncover a chest full of treasure.
Inside the chest, you find some old coins and a map to a secret fishing spot near the outskirts of the village.

Ocean Shore.title: Guided by the Ring,
Ocean Shore.description: Unlock Lighthouse Pier if player has Dead Hermit's Ring equipped.
dialogue: You feel a strange pull towards the distant lighthouse, as if the ring is guiding you.
The waves crash against the rocks, and you can see a pier in the distance.
You decide to follow the ring's guidance and head towards the lighthouse pier.

Lighthouse Pier.title: 🗼 Lighthouse Pier Encounter
Lighthouse Pier.description: You approach the lighthouse door and it is locked, the Dead Hermit's Ring, begins pulling you towards the water.
dialogue: You approach the door to the lighthouse, but it is locked tight,
The Dead Hermit's Ring begins to glow and pull you towards the water.
It seems like the ring wants you to keep fishing, even though you wanted to enter the lighthouse.

Lighthouse Pier.title: 🗝️ Opening the Lighthouse Door
Lighthouse Pier.description: You use the key you caught earlier to unlock the lighthouse door.
dialogue: You take out the Lighthouse Key and insert it into the lock.
With a satisfying click, the door swings open, revealing the interior of the lighthouse.
You step inside.
You notice in one corner a fishing hole, it seems like the Dead Hermit used to fish here.
You spot a tunic on the floor, it the ring feels war as you pick it up.
